failure_reason: Voltage collapse at ~30% load — MATPOWER cannot solve flat-start FNM ACPF
methods_attempted: NR (flat start, all variants: NR, NR-IC, NR-SP, NR-SH, NR-IH)
runcpf continuation power flow (stuck at nose point ~30%)
root_cause: FNM RAW file is a planning model with flat start (all VM=1.0, VA=0.0, Vg=1.0). No solved voltage profile exists. 86 islands detected (main: 27862 buses). 541 series capacitors (negative X). MATPOWER solvers cannot initialize from this state at full load.
note: G-FNM-4 should test whether evaluated tools can converge where MATPOWER cannot, rather than comparing to a reference solution
